Iran and Houthis Strike Tankers as US Bombing Continues

— S3 · Conflict · Bab el-Mandeb · 16m ago. Iranian and Houthi forces attacked tankers, disrupting shipping in the Bab el-Mandeb Strait and Strait of Hormuz, while US bombing operations persist in the region.
US B-1B Bombers Strike IRGC Sites in Iran
— S3 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 6h ago. First US strikes on Iran since ceasefire failed; B-1B Lancers hit IRGC-operated sites, per US officials.
